title: catesbaea parvifolia
intro: Catesbaea parvifolia, also known as the small-leaf false buttonbush or small-leaved catesbaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Catesbaea parvifolia include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Catesbaea parvifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
